mapper.select: SELECT id, job_id, job_name, job_type, executor_address, executor_handler, params, status, retry_times, fail_reason, start_time, end_time, cost_time, result, host_address, create_time FROM schedule_job_log WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, job_id, job_name, job_type, executor_address, executor_handler, params, status, retry_times, fail_reason, start_time, end_time, cost_time, result, host_address, create_time FROM schedule_job_log ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
